title: No source code delivered — workspace is empty
evidence: find . in run_dir lists only TASK.md, logs, and *.json; there are no .rs files, no Cargo.toml, no src/, no README.md. _agent_stdout.log claims to have created src/lib.rs, src/main.rs, Cargo.toml, README.md, but the file-mutation verifier reports write_file was 'Refusing to write to sensitive system path' for Cargo.toml (agent wrote to an absolute /private/var/folders temp path outside the archived workspace).
suggestion: Fix the agent harness so writes target the run workspace (relative paths), not the host temp dir; treat this run as a hard failure regardless of cached scores.

title: scores.json is inconsistent with the archive (test_coverage=1.0 but zero code/tests exist)
evidence: scores.json reports test_coverage=1.0, code_quality=0.833, defect_rate=0.924, but the workspace contains no buildable code or tests; no matching row exists in retort.db for agent=hermes-local language=rust prompt=neutral replicate=3. Scores appear cached/stale from a prior run (dir suffix '-cached') and do not reflect this archive.
suggestion: Do not trust these scores for this run; re-score against the actual (empty) archive or mark the run failed.

title: POST /books not delivered
evidence: No source files in workspace; no create route exists on disk.
suggestion: Deliver a create-book route in the workspace.

suggestion: Deliver a get-by-id route with 404 handling.

suggestion: Deliver JSON responses with correct status codes.

title: No tests delivered (>=3 required)
evidence: No test files in workspace; stdout claims '8 tests passing' but no test code exists on disk.
